mapper.select: SELECT id, student_no, real_name, id_card_suffix, college, major, class_name, enrollment_year, status, bound_user_id, create_time, update_time FROM biz_student_roster WHERE student_no = #{studentNo}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_student_roster (student_no, real_name, id_card_suffix, college, major, class_name, enrollment_year, status) VALUES
(#{item.studentNo}, #{item.realName}, #{item.idCardSuffix}, #{item.college}, #{item.major}, #{item.className}, #{item.enrollmentYear}, #{item.status})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE real_name = VALUES(real_name), id_card_suffix = VALUES(id_card_suffix), college = VALUES(college), major = VALUES(major), class_name = VALUES(class_name), enrollment_year = VALUES(enrollment_year), status = VALUES(status), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_student_roster SET bound_user_id = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE bound_user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.nickname AS nickname, u.verified_student_no AS studentNo, r.real_name AS realName, r.college AS college, r.major AS major, r.class_name AS className, u.verified AS verified, u.verified_time AS verifiedTime FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN biz_student_roster r ON u.verified_student_no = r.student_no
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.verified_student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.verified = #{verified}
ORDER BY u.verified_time DESC
